predictions.prediction: Upcoming release 'Neon Letters' will be released on April 18th, with a pre-save strategy already in place.
predictions.recommended_action: Follow up on the last email interaction to confirm the cover choice and finalize any pending tasks.

check_in_message.subject: Neon Letters Pre-save Strategy Update - Your Role in It!
check_in_message.message:
<Hi Aria,

I hope you're doing well! I wanted to touch base on our upcoming single 'Neon Letters'. We've got everything all set for the pre-save strategy, and it's crucial that we get a strong response from your fanbase before the release. I'm reaching out now because I noticed no recent contact in over two weeks. Would you be available this week to discuss the cover choice and finalize any other pending tasks? Your input is invaluable as we gear up for what promises to be a big hit.

Best,
The Label Owner>
check_in_message.tone_notes: <Warm and direct, setting an immediate tone of support while also gently pushing forward with action items that need completion.>

action_items.action: Confirm final cover choice for 'Neon Letters' and finalize any remaining audio details.

risk_assessment.churn_risk_reason: <There is a medium risk of churn due to the critical health score, which indicates that immediate attention and positive engagement are required to avoid losing Aria's support.
